description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures standing on a rugged, rocky base. The taller figure, draped in a long robe, stands behind and slightly above a smaller, partially nude figure who appears to be holding a staff or pole. The taller figure's hand rests gently on the shoulder of the smaller figure, suggesting guidance or protection. The drapery of the robe is intricately detailed, with folds cascading down the back and sides. The rocky base is irregular and textured, giving the impression of a natural outcrop. The entire piece is rendered in a monochromatic, stone-like material.
description: A detailed sculpture of two human figures, one robed and one partially nude, standing on a rugged stone base with a staff or pole.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly, with the taller robed figure behind and the smaller figure holding a staff in front.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the draped robe of the taller figure and the rocky base.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the flowing robe and the full extent of the rocky base, with both figures' backs visible.
description_view_3: Side view showing the interaction between the two figures and the staff, as well as the layered rock base.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures, one robed and one partially nude, on a rocky base
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
